_comment: Single source of truth for tunable economy values. To revert any rebalance, edit values here and ship a new build — no Dart changes needed. Player profile state (coins/unlocks) is unaffected by config edits, and existing unlocks are protected by grandfatheredCards on the profile.
_rationale_thresholds: Playtest with 8/8/6 yr olds finished ~80% of the album in 1-2 sessions under the v0.1.0 baseline (1/3/7/15). New values aim for 3-5x stretch: kids still see early wins on Commons (3 bursts feels easy at 1 burst/sec), Rares take a couple of focused minutes, Epics stretch across sessions, Legendaries become a long-term goal.
_rationale_prices: Anchored to ~450 coins/session at current pack reward rates. Common = ~1/4 session, Rare = ~1 session, Epic = ~3-4 sessions, Legendary = a real saving goal. Half of the game-dev agent's most-aggressive proposal — conservative until playtest data lands.
_rationale_dupe: Common dupes give 1 coin (not 0) so the wallet ticks visibly when a player taps a known character — the anti-spam cooldown handles inflation, but a 0-coin pop with no toast and no sound was indistinguishable from a bug to playtesters (P1.8). 1 coin x ~40 spawns = ~40 coins/session of dupe drip, well under the milestone rewards. Higher rarities still feel rewarding when you hit a duplicate.
_rationale_anti_spam: 1 second per-smashable cooldown. Bursts on the same id within the window play full ASMR feedback (sounds, particles) but grant zero coins/burst-credit. Silent throttle — never visible to the player. Catches kids who hammer the same object; doesn't affect normal varied play.
_rationale_milestones: Pack-completion coin drips. Crossing 25/50/75/100% in a pack fires the matching reward once. Gives kids a 'something happened' beat between rare drops so progress feels tangible even on a dry session.
